input.title: Apple reports record Q2 earnings, raises full-year guidance
input.content: Apple Inc (AAPL) posted quarterly earnings that topped Wall Street estimates, driven by Services and iPhone demand in emerging markets. Management raised full-year revenue guidance and announced a larger share repurchase authorization. Shares rose in after-hours trading.

mockModelResponse.headline: Apple beats estimates and raises guidance
mockModelResponse.summary: Apple reported better-than-expected quarterly results and raised full-year guidance, citing Services and iPhone strength. The company also expanded its buyback program.

meta.notes: Clear named ticker + earnings catalyst with guidance raise.
